title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.389 - Roy Bassett Memorial Bridge designated for U.S. Highway 63 Gasconade River Bridge in Maries County
text:
227.389.  Roy Bassett Memorial Bridge designated for U.S. Highway 63 Gasconade River Bridge in Maries County. — The U.S. Highway 63 Gasconade River Bridge in Maries County shall be designated the "Roy Bassett Memorial Bridge".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by friends of Roy Bassett.
(L. 2008 H.B. 1952)
